mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO repair_request_images ( repair_request_id, image_url, sort_no ) VALUES
( #{repairRequestId}, #{imageUrl}, (#{startSortNo} + ${index}) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, repair_request_id, image_url, sort_no, created_at FROM repair_request_images WHERE repair_request_id = #{repairRequestId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
